# BrushForge

> BrushForge is a free mobile app (Android & iOS) for miniature painters. It converts paints between brands using Delta E 2000 color science, tracks your paint collection, and generates painting recipes. The database covers 4,300+ paints across Citadel, Vallejo, Army Painter, AK Interactive, Scale75, Pro Acryl, and more — for Warhammer 40k, Age of Sigmar, D&D, and other tabletop miniatures.

Key facts:

- Paint converter: finds the closest equivalent paint across brands using LAB color space and Delta E 2000 matching (for example, converting a Citadel paint to its Vallejo or Army Painter equivalent).
- Paint database: 4,300+ paints from Citadel, Vallejo (Model, Game, Air, Mecha Color), Army Painter (Warpaints, Fanatic, Speedpaint), AK Interactive (3rd Gen), Scale75, Pro Acryl, and more.
- Inventory ("My Paints"): track owned paints, wishlist, and custom mixes; a visual palette view plots your collection on a color wheel to reveal gaps.
- Paint details: every paint shows highlight and shadow suggestions, cross-brand equivalents, and a color harmony wheel.
- Recipes & projects: save painting recipes, generate new ones with the AI recipe generator, and share them with the community (community features in Android beta).
- Smart tools: Lighting Tool (preview zenithal or noir lighting on a photo of an unpainted miniature) and Scheme Analyzer (upload a photo of a painted miniature to identify the paints used).
- Pricing: the Hobbyist tier is free forever (ad-supported, with limits of 40 inventory paints, 5 recipes, 1 project, and 5 generator tokens per month). The Master premium tier — subscription or one-time lifetime purchase — unlocks unlimited inventory, recipes, and projects, 100 generator tokens per month, multi-device cloud sync, and no ads.
- Platforms: Android (Google Play) and iOS (App Store). The app is offline-first. Data does not yet sync between iOS and Android.
- BrushForge is an independent app by a solo developer and is not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Games Workshop Limited.

## Pages

- [Home](https://brushforgeapp.com/): features, pricing, and frequently asked questions
- [About](https://brushforgeapp.com/about.html): what BrushForge is and why it exists
- [The Story](https://brushforgeapp.com/the-story.html): how a miniature painter built BrushForge as a solo developer
- [Support](https://brushforgeapp.com/support.html): help, contact, purchases, and data requests
- [Privacy Policy](https://brushforgeapp.com/privacy.html): what data is collected and how to request deletion or export
- [Terms of Use](https://brushforgeapp.com/terms.html)

## Get the app

- [Android — Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.brushforge.brushforge_android_app)
- [iOS — App Store](https://apps.apple.com/be/app/brushforge/id6749896227)
- [Community Discord](https://discord.gg/U9yD96BhA4)
